violations.text: Allergen statement is lacking on menu. Allergen statement must be added. PIC has put allergen statement cards at tables. Per PIC, 2026 menu will be printed soon, and allergen statement will be added. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, shrimp and chicken was placed hot in the prep unit in containers greater than four inches deep. Shrimp and chicken were placed on sheet pans and moved to freezer at the time of inspection. Establishment is to stop cooling in the prep unit. Proper cooling methods reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar internal indicating device. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2025

The dumpster outside is located on grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Per PIC, the city of Burrillville needs to be contacted. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025
Allergen statement is lacking on menu. Allergen statement must be added. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off and put out of order at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to use ice machine until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025

Small bag of beef, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Beef was observed at 50 DF. Beef was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, shrimp and chicken was placed hot in the prep unit in containers greater than four inches deep. Shrimp and chicken were placed on sheet pans and moved to freezer at the time of inspection. Proper cooling methods reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar internal indicating device. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2025

The dumpster outside is located on grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025

The Quaternary Ammonium sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Quaternary Ammonium sanitizing solutions must be between 200-400 ppm. At time of inspection, unit was out of service and 3 bay sink was in use. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quaternary Ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024
Establishment is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024
Sanitizer bucket was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of brown and orange residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

The quaternary ammonium sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 100 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 200-400 ppm. PIC called for service and will sanitize in 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

Garlic and eggs were observed held in prep area at 60-71 degrees Fahrenheit. Per interview with PIC, foods were put 1-2 hours prior, moved to ice bath at the time of inspection. Cream in bar cooler was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Per interview with PIC, cream has been in cooler since last night. PIC informed to not store TCS foods in unit until unit reaches an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

Several prepared foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024
Employees' medicines were not stored to prevent the contamination of food, equipment, or utensils. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024
Various foods and drinks were observed stored on the floor in the storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

At the time of inspection, ambient of bar cooler was 45 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC informed on NOT storing TCS foods in unit until it reaches at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

Wood is used in the construction of the wall mount in the mop sink area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quaternary Ammonium sanitizing solution for the dishwasher and 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024
The wall juncture in the mop sink area is in poor repair, observed incomplete seal. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024
